# CONCEPT DICE HISTORY

*Append-only log. Each new concept dice roll is added here. Before rolling, the script reads the last 5 entries and re-rolls if ≥2 collision-relevant axes match.*

*Collision-relevant axes: region, archetype, mood, light, composition, texture.*

*Source of truth — managed by `scripts/concept_dice.py`. Do not edit manually unless correcting a bad roll before generation begins.*
